name: Dead Reckoning Co.
specialty: Dead Reckoning Co. specializes in navigating the rifts, offering a unique service of retrieving lost or stolen artifacts from the other realms.

members.name: Ezra Voss
members.note: Once a member of the Wardens of Ash, he left after a failed mission that haunts him to this day.

members.name: Kara Shen
members.note: Her agile form and keen senses make her an invaluable member in the chaotic Undercity.

members.name: Thorne Ironfist
members.note: His missing left eye replaced by a glowing gemstone, he's a formidable presence in any fight.

visual: The trio wears matching leather armor, each adorned with a compass symbol in unique materials - silver for Ezra, obsidian for Kara, and iron for Thorne. They carry themselves with a silent, calculated intensity that makes others wary.
reputation_note: Whispers suggest they have connections deep within the rifts, and that their services come with a steep price - but always deliver results.
